Crot-h..Back: Carbuncles that come upon the neck and upon the back begin with a pustule, and then several come and they are surrounded by little pustules and papules and there is pitting upon pressure.
Crot-h..Generalities: An awful state of nervousness prevails. Trembling of the limbs, tremulous weakness. On protruding the tongue it comes out quivering. Tired by the slightest exertion. Sudden prostration of the vital powers. A paralytic weakness prevails throughout.
Crot-h..Generalities, faintness, fainting: A mental and physical prostration that is almost paralytic in character.
Crot-h..Generalities, side, right: Cannot lie on the right side or back without instantly producing black, bilious vomiting.
Crot-h..Genitalia female: Hemorrhages, Either dark clots or blood that has no tendency to coagulate and keeps on flowing. There is great trouble at the climacteric period. Hot flashes. Jaundice. Hemorrhage from the uterus or from other parts. Cancer of the uterus with much bleeding.
Crot-h..Mouth: Inflammation of the gums. Bleeding from the mouth. Inflammation of the throat with bleeding of the throat. Burning in the throat and mouth, Trembling, quivering and swollen tongue. Trembling of the tongue when it is put out.
Crot-h..Rectum: Stool black, thin, like coffee grounds. Dysentery of septic origin from foul water, food, etc. Diarrhoea from noxious effluvia.
Crot-h..Skin: Boils, carbuncles and eruptions are surrounded by a purplish condition of the skin, a mottled, blue, splotched or marbled state. It produces boils, abscesses and a condition somewhat resembling a carbuncle, with burning and violent pains, but the peculiar feature is the doughy centre. Around the boil or carbuncle for many inches there is oedema, with pitting upon pressure.
Crot-h..Stomach: Pain in the stomach; coldness as if a piece of ice were in the stomach or in the abdomen. Stomach irritable, unable to retain anything, constantly throws up blood.
Crot-h..Generalities, faintness: A mental and physical prostration that is almost paralytic in character. Sudden prostration of the vital powers.
Crot-h..Generalities, side: Cannot lie on the right side or back without instantly producing black, bilious vomiting.
Crot-h..Generalities, weakness: Tremulous weakness. Tired by the slightest exertion. Sudden prostration of the vital powers. A paralytic weakness prevails throughout.
Crot-h..Appetite: He craves intoxicating drinks and is unable to resist the craving. This wonderful resemblance to old inebriates has led to the use of Crotalus in delirium tremens; it has the besotted countenance, the purple aspect of the face, the peculiar kind of hunger in the drunkard, the craving by spells for stimulants.
Crot-h..Appetite, desires: He craves intoxicating drinks and is unable to resist the craving.
Crot-h..Clinical: Crotalus is indicated in disease of the very lowest, the most putrid type, coming on with unusual rapidity, reaching that putrid state in an unusually short time. Crotalus has cured ulceration of the stomach. It has greatly restrained the growth of carcinoma when there is much vomiting of bile and blood.
Crot-h..Heart & Circulation: There is some reason to think that this will be more or less a heart remedy from the great cardiac weakness it produces. But the other snake poisons like Naja, Lach. and Elaps have had more clinical application than this one. This one seems to prostrate the heart, but also to prostrate the whole body.
Crot-h..Ear: Surging in the ears. Sensitive to noises. Dull aching and throbbing in the ears. Foetid, copious, yellow, offensive, bloody discharges from the ears.
Crot-h..Stool: Stool black, thin, like coffee grounds. Dysentery of septic origin from foul water, food, etc. Diarrhoea from noxious effluvia.
Crot-h..Throat: Inflammation of the throat with bleeding of the throat. Burning in the throat and mouth. The throat will be filled up under such circumstances with a diphtheritic membrane that looks dark. There is bleeding all around it.
Crot-h..Ear, discharges: Foetid, copious, yellow, offensive, bloody discharges from the ears. Blood oozing from the ears in drops in zymotic diseases, low forms of scarlet fever, or of diphtheria where there is oozing from the eyes and ears.
Crot-h..Eye: Hemorrhage from the eyes. Yellow appearance of the eyes. Blood exudes from the eye, burning in eyes; redness with lachrymation. Pressure in the eyes as if the eyes would be pushed out from the head. Paralysis of the upper lids.
Crot-h..Mouth, protruded, tongue: Trembling, quivering and swollen tongue. Trembling of the tongue when it is put out.
Crot-h..Stomach, nausea: Cannot lie on the right side or back without instantly producing black, bilious vomiting. This is a wonderfully bilious remedy, sick headaches, vomiting of bile in great quantities.
Crot-h..Stomach, vomiting: Cannot lie on the right side or back without instantly producing black, bilious vomiting. The various low forms of disease calling for Crotalus often, begin with vomiting great quantities of bile, sometimes bile mixed with blood. Stomach irritable, unable to retain anything, constantly throws up blood.
